title: Global Markets Brief — 17 Jul 2026
intro: Risk-off sentiment dominates as Nikkei plunges 4% on resurging yen strength fears and tech selloff contagion spreads from Wall Street, though defensive assets like gold hold firm near $4000.

sections.heading: 🌍 MACRO TONE
sections.content: Risk-off sentiment dominates as Nikkei plunges 4% on resurging yen strength fears and tech selloff contagion spreads from Wall Street, though defensive assets like gold hold firm near $4000.

sections.heading: 📊 FX RANKING
sections.content:
NZD +0.12% — commodity currency resilience despite broader risk-off mood
EUR +0.06% — dollar weakness on softer US data expectations
USD/JPY -0.03% — yen consolidating after recent intervention-driven gains
USD/CAD -0.06% — oil strength supporting loonie
AUD -0.14% — China growth concerns weighing on risk-linked aussie
GBP -0.14% — profit-taking after recent rally above 1.35
CHF -0.19% — franc weakens despite safe-haven flows

sections.heading: 💱 KEY PAIRS
sections.content:
EUR/USD 1.1451 | Bias: NEUTRAL | Watch: Support at 1.1420, resistance at 1.1480 as ECB policy speculation builds
USD/JPY 162.29 | Bias: SHORT | Watch: Intervention risk elevated above 162.00, BOJ rhetoric hawkish
GBP/USD 1.3461 | Bias: LONG | Watch: Dips toward 1.3420 are buying opportunities on UK data resilience

sections.heading: 📈 INDICES
sections.content:
Nikkei 225: 64141 -4.03% — sharp selloff on export sector concerns and yen appreciation pressures
S&P 500: 5750.72 -0.54% — tech weakness dragging broader market, defensive rotation underway
Nasdaq: 25882 -1.47% — AI sector profit-taking accelerates, valuations under scrutiny
FTSE 100: 10609 +0.35% — outperformer on energy sector gains and defensive positioning

sections.heading: 🛢️ COMMODITIES
sections.content:
Gold: $3996.70 +0.12% — safe-haven bid intact as geopolitical tensions and equity volatility support demand
WTI Crude: $78.77 +0.63% — supply concerns and Middle East tensions offsetting demand worries
Silver: $55.70 -0.88% — industrial metal weakness on growth concerns despite precious metal strength

sections.heading: ₿ CRYPTO
sections.content:
Bitcoin: $62796 -1.56% — correlation with Nasdaq remains high as risk appetite fades and regulatory headwinds persist
Ethereum: $1827.84 -1.90% — underperforming BTC on network congestion concerns and DeFi sector pressure

sections.heading: 🎯 TRADE IDEAS
sections.content:
LONG: USD/JPY puts | 162.00 strike | BOJ intervention risk escalating with verbal warnings intensifying
LONG: Gold | $3980-3990 | Safe-haven flows to accelerate if equity selloff deepens
SHORT: Nasdaq | 25900-26000 | Tech valuation correction has further to run, momentum broken
SHORT: AUD/USD |
